title: cousinia odontolepis subsp. kurdica
intro: Cousinia odontolepis subsp. kurdica is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, commonly known as Cousinia or Cousinia odontolepis, which is native to parts of Iran. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Cousinia odontolepis subsp. kurdica are said to include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to help manage certain medical conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties and reap its benefits.
